top_findings: robots.txt blocks GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended and other AI crawlers, undermining AI-search/GEO visibility
No HTTP security headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP, Referrer-Policy) observed
sitemap.xml lists only the redirecting root URL, not the canonical /ru and /en pages
og:url and Person schema url point to the redirecting root instead of the canonical locale URL
"Резюме скоро" placeholder content is live in production
quick_wins: List /ru and /en (with lastmod) in sitemap.xml instead of the redirecting root
Align og:url and JSON-LD url with the canonical URL
Decide deliberately on AI-crawler robots.txt access

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Reachable with fast TTFB (~160ms), HTTP/3 advertised
robots.txt and sitemap.xml both present and reachable
Clean locale routing (/ -> 307 -> /ru, /en serves directly)
Correct canonical tag and ru/en hreflang alternates
Valid HTML5, correct lang attribute per locale

findings.title: robots.txt disallows major AI crawlers
findings.description: Cloudflare-managed robots.txt block disallows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, CCBot, Bytespider, Amazonbot, Applebot-Extended, meta-externalagent, and CloudflareBrowserRenderingCrawler, despite a Content-Signal header suggesting reference use is allowed.
findings.recommendation: Disable or scope down Cloudflare's 'Block AI Scrapers and Crawlers' feature if AI-search citation is a goal; otherwise keep as an intentional choice.

findings.title: Missing HTTP security headers
findings.description: No Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Referrer-Policy, or Permissions-Policy headers observed on the /ru response.
findings.recommendation: Add headers via Cloudflare Transform Rules or Next.js headers() config.

findings.title: Sitemap references redirecting URL only
findings.description: sitemap.xml contains only https://1410666.xyz/, which 307-redirects to /ru. Neither /ru nor /en appear, and there is no lastmod.
findings.recommendation: List /ru and /en explicitly with lastmod dates.

findings.title: og:url mismatched with canonical
findings.description: og:url is set to the redirecting root URL instead of the canonical https://1410666.xyz/ru.
findings.recommendation: Align og:url to the canonical URL per locale.

findings.title: No x-default hreflang
findings.description: Only ru and en hreflang alternates are declared; no x-default fallback.

findings.title: llms.txt missing
findings.recommendation: Optional addition once AI-crawler access policy is finalized.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: First-person, specific, credible content with a concrete tech stack
Entity verification via sameAs links to GitHub, X, Discord
Full content parity between RU and EN locales

findings.title: Very thin content footprint
findings.description: The entire site is a single page with roughly 150-200 words of visible text; no supporting pages exist.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding project deep-dive pages if organic discovery matters; otherwise acceptable as an intentional bio-page constraint.

findings.title: Placeholder content live in production
findings.description: "Резюме скоро" ("Resume coming soon") is visible copy on the live site.
findings.recommendation: Finish the resume section or remove the teaser until ready.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique, descriptive title and meta description per locale
Single clear H1 per page
Semantic in-page anchors and skip-to-content pattern
Correct viewport meta tag

findings.title: H1/copy not keyword-targeted
findings.description: Heading and body copy prioritize brand voice over explicit query-matching phrases.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable for a personal brand page; revisit only if targeting specific search queries.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Valid Person JSON-LD with name, url, email, jobTitle, description, sameAs

findings.title: No ProfilePage schema
findings.description: Person schema is not wrapped in a ProfilePage type, which Google recommends for profile-style pages.
findings.recommendation: Add ProfilePage schema wrapping the existing Person data.

findings.title: Schema url points to redirecting root
findings.description: Person.url is https://1410666.xyz/ (redirects) rather than the canonical locale URL.
findings.recommendation: Update to the canonical https://1410666.xyz/ru (or per-locale).

categories.name: Performance
what_works: Fast TTFB (~160ms) from Cloudflare edge
HTTP/3 advertised via alt-svc
Small, well-split JS/CSS chunks
No raster images in current DOM

findings.title: CWV not lab-measurable in this environment
findings.description: No Lighthouse/CDP tooling was available to measure LCP/INP/CLS directly.
findings.recommendation: Run PageSpeed Insights against https://1410666.xyz/ru for authoritative data.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Clean, extractable prose with no JS rendering barriers for core content
Structured Person entity data with sameAs cross-linking

findings.title: AI crawlers blocked at robots.txt level
findings.description: Same finding as Technical SEO: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended and others are disallowed.
findings.recommendation: Deliberately decide whether AI-search citation is a goal and adjust robots.txt accordingly.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Full favicon set (ico, svg, 96x96 png, apple-touch-icon) plus manifest.webmanifest
og:image correctly sized 1200x630 with og:image:alt set

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Decide deliberately on AI-crawler robots.txt access

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and other security headers

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Fix sitemap.xml to list /ru and /en with lastmod
Align og:url and JSON-LD url with canonical URLs
Remove or finish the resume placeholder

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Run PageSpeed Insights periodically for CWV field data
Add llms.txt once AI-crawler policy is finalized
